rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Place component type annexes for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations
Use component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings like assignments
Treat each annex block as scoped to its owning component declaration
generic_rules: Use exact current-case names from the model index for identifiers
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed
Do not invent ports/components or copy identifiers from examples
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions may only reference identifiers visible in the current component scope
Use `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks for AGREE contracts
anti_patterns: Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit exposure
Do not invent or copy identifiers from examples
